---
title: "Lucas M. Novaes"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/photo.png
  image-shape: rectangle
---

Welcome! I am associate professor at [Insper Institute for Education and Research](https://www.insper.edu.br), São Paulo, Brazil, where I investigate political representation in the developing world.

<div class="contact-icons">
[<i class="bi bi-envelope" aria-label="Email"></i>](mailto:lucasmn2@insper.edu.br)
[<i class="bi bi-google" aria-label="Google Scholar"></i>](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=zVT_HkgAAAAJ)
[<i class="bi bi-twitter" aria-label="Twitter"></i>](https://twitter.com/lmnovaes)
[<i class="bi bi-building" aria-label="Insper"></i>](https://www.insper.edu.br)
</div>

I am also an associate at the [Governance and Local Development Institute](https://gld.gu.se/), University of Gothenburg, and a former research fellow at the [Institute for Advanced Study in Toulouse](https://www.iast.fr/) (2016--2018).

My work has been published in the *American Political Science Review*, *American Journal of Political Science*, and the *Journal of Politics*, among other outlets.

I received my Ph.D. in Political Science from the University of California, Berkeley, in 2015.

**Research interests:** comparative politics, political representation, political parties, clientelism, Brazilian politics.
